compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Defend against LLM-judge non-determinism and false confidence.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Reject any LLM-judge scorer without an explicit pinned grader (temp 0, seed, dated snapshot, cross-family from generator).
- [ ] Epochs explicit; gates use at_least(k) (never pass_at/pass_k); coverage threshold enforced.
- [ ] Deterministic scorers gate; LLM-judge scorers report; rubrics length-neutral + pointwise.
Files: src/rebar/llm/eval.py
compiled_state.title: WS-G2: Grader discipline + coverage + scoring split
